title: 'Iythiy'el #0384
definition:
Ithiel = "God is with me"

 1) the disciple to whom Agur gave proverbs
 2) a Benjamite in Nehemiah's time
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ithiel = "God is with me"

 1) the disciple to whom Agur gave proverbs
 2) a Benjamite in Nehemiah's time

    NASB:  with me is God, an Isr. name
